rationale: Both candidates independently verified the AutoWeightsLoader delegation logic and both caught the exact latent gap (the still-unmigrated hunyuan_image3_transformer.py diffusion loader, later #4891), citing the correct file/line. X is tighter and slightly more precise (fewer, less redundant findings, plus a sharp catch that the delegated-loader test bypasses AutoWeightsLoader), but files the missing-loader issue only as a 'non-blocking' note. Y matches more of the ground-truth reviewer's specific points (explicit '+1 keep the test' endorsement, the qwen2_old getattr-guard cleanup framing) and correctly escalates the missing-loader gap to a 'major' finding with concrete remediation options and grep evidence, which better reflects its true severity given it became a real follow-up bug; its two comment-nitpick minors add some low-value padding that costs it a bit of precision.
